_comment: Additional Stremio subtitle display strings introduced in v1.5.3.

messages.config.otherSettings.mobileMode.label: Mobile Mode (complete delivery)
messages.config.otherSettings.mobileMode.descript: Waits for the complete translation before responding to Stremio on Android/iOS. Duplicate requests share the same job, and reopening the stream receives a fresh URL after completion.
messages.config.otherSettings.mobileMode.timeoutD: This limits the whole translation wait, independently from an individual AI request timeout. Long waits require a reverse proxy that permits long-running responses.
messages.subtitle.mobileTimeoutBody: The translation continues in the background. Reopen the video or subtitle list, then select the same source entry inside the target-language group.
messages.toolbox.studio.tile.title: Subtitle Studio
messages.toolbox.studio.tile.body: Repair, retime, rewrap, and clean SRT files locally in your browser.
messages.toolbox.studio.title: Subtitle Studio
messages.toolbox.studio.description: Drop in an SRT file, inspect its health, make precise fixes, and download the result. Your subtitle never leaves this browser.
messages.toolbox.studio.dropTitle: Drop an SRT here or tap to browse
messages.toolbox.studio.dropMeta: UTF-8 · maximum 5 MB · nothing is uploaded
messages.toolbox.studio.diagnostics.title: Live diagnostics
messages.toolbox.studio.diagnostics.empty: Load or paste an SRT to start checking it.
messages.toolbox.studio.diagnostics.noIssues: No structural or readability issues detected.
messages.toolbox.studio.diagnostics.summary: Invalid blocks: {invalid} · overlaps: {overlaps} · invalid durations: {reversed} · out of order: {order} · long lines: {longLines} · fast cues: {speed}
messages.toolbox.studio.repair.title: Validate + repair
messages.toolbox.studio.repair.help: Sorts cues, rebuilds numbering, normalizes timestamps, fixes invalid durations, and optionally removes overlaps.
messages.toolbox.studio.shift.title: Shift timing
messages.toolbox.studio.shift.help: Use a positive value for later subtitles or a negative value for earlier subtitles.
messages.toolbox.studio.fps.title: Convert frame rate
messages.toolbox.studio.fps.help: Retimes every cue for a different video frame rate without changing its text.
messages.toolbox.studio.wrap.title: Smart line wrapping
messages.toolbox.studio.wrap.help: Rebalances words into readable lines without deleting subtitle text.
messages.toolbox.studio.replace.title: Find + replace
messages.toolbox.studio.replace.help: Changes subtitle text only; numbering and timestamps stay protected.
messages.toolbox.studio.status.empty: Load or paste an SRT first.
messages.toolbox.studio.status.tooLarge: Subtitle text is larger than the 5 MB browser processing limit.
messages.toolbox.studio.status.copyFailed: Clipboard access failed. Select the text and copy it manually.
